regex.target: Notice("Painter: 颜色16进制代码缺失")

regex.source: text:"Add atleast 1 color to showcase different styles"
regex.target: text:"添加至少1种颜色以展示不同的样式效果"
.setName("用于清除样式的额外CSS选择器")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the menu style - 'minimal' shows icons only in one line")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置菜单样式 - 'minimal' 模式下仅显示单列图标")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose between highlighting with inline CSS or CSS classes. Please note that there are pros and cons to both choices. Inline CSS will keep you from being reliant on external CSS files if you choose to export your notes. CSS classes are more flexible and easier to customize.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择以内联CSS或CSS类显示高亮。 请注意，这两种方式各有利弊。内联CSS形式能让你导出笔记时免于依赖外部CSS文件。CSS类则更加灵活且更容易定制。")

regex.source: .setDesc('The "Painter: Clear" command clears all "mark" elements. However, you might wish to remove other elements as well. Add CSS Selectors to be cleaned here (one per line)')
regex.target: .setDesc('"Painter: Clear" 命令将移除所有"mark" 元素。 不过，您可能也希望能移除其他元素。请在此处添加用于移除元素的CSS选择器（每行一个）。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Normally, new highlights overwrite old ones. Turn this off to keep previous highlights when highlighting. You will have to clear highlights manually when changing their color.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，新的高亮会直接将旧的覆盖掉。若关闭该选项，在使用高亮功能时会保留旧的高亮元素。你在更换颜色时需要手动清除既往的高亮元素。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Depending on your design aesthetic, you may want to customize the style of your highlights. Choose from an assortment of different highlighter styles by using the dropdown. Depending on your theme, this plugin's CSS may be overriden.")
regex.target: .setDesc("基于你的设计美学，你可能想要自定义你的高亮样式。通过下拉菜单，你可以从各种不同的高亮样式中进行选择。不过本插件的CSS样式可能会被你的主题样式覆盖掉。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Create new highlight colors by providing a color name and using the color picker to set the hex code value. Don't forget to save the color before exiting the color picker. Drag and drop the highlight color to change the order for your highlighter component.")
regex.target: .setDesc("通过填入颜色名称并使用取色器设置十六进制代码值来创建新的高亮颜色。在退出颜色选择器之前，别忘了保存颜色。按住左侧小点拖放高亮颜色以更改高亮组件的顺序。")

regex.source: .setPlaceholder("Color HEX: Click off color picker to update")
regex.target: .setPlaceholder("16进制值: 点击关闭取色器后刷新")
